story: Anthony tastes his opponent Gratz’s messy-looking slice and is stunned by its Sunday-gravy depth; he realizes her gravy and his airy crust could be unbeatable and considers approaching her to suggest a collaboration. Jenny, Gratz’s sous-chef, is working nearby. Earlier, in her truck, Gratz told Jenny that if Anthony ever asked to combine her gravy with his crust, she’d say yes. In the crowded Mixer, Anthony must decide how to make first contact.
implausible_knowledge: Earlier, in her truck, Gratz told Jenny that if Anthony ever asked to combine her gravy with his crust, she’d say yes.
question: After deciding their strengths belong together, how will Anthony choose to approach Gratz at the Mixer?
answer_with_knowledge: Walk straight to Gratz’s truck and openly propose teaming up on a joint entry.
answer_without_knowledge: Quietly ask Jenny for a small gravy sample and offer Gratz an anonymous test slice on his crust with a “Try me” note.
